name: Boss ignored my chemical safety complaints - retaliation now?

mainEntity.name: Boss ignored my chemical safety complaints - retaliation now?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Illegal; file OSHA charge and comp if injured.** Protects reporters[1][5]. **Key factors:** Document complaints. **Practical guidance:** Written records, union help. Lawyer sues for reinstatement. **Strong anti-retaliation laws.**
